mapper.select: SELECT * FROM s_common_code_sub WHERE SC_MC_IN_C = #{MC_IN_C} AND SC_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SC_CODELV
mapper.update: UPDATE s_common_code_main SET MC_CODENM = #{{MC_CODENM}, MC_USE_YN = #{{MC_USE_YN} , MC_MODDT = SYSDATE() WHERE MC_KEYNO = #{{MC_KEYNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO s_common_code_main( MC_KEYNO, MC_CODENM, MC_REGDT, MC_IN_C, MC_SYS_YN, MC_USE_YN ) VALUES( #{{MC_KEYNO}, #{{MC_CODENM}, SYSDATE(), #{{MC_IN_C}, 'N', 'Y' )

INSERT INTO s_common_code_sub( SC_KEYNO, SC_MC_IN_C, SC_CODENM, SC_CODEVAL01, SC_CODEVAL02, SC_CODELV, SC_USE_YN ) VALUES( #{SC_KEYNO}, #{SC_MC_IN_C}, #{SC_CODENM}, #{SC_CODEVAL01}, #{SC_CODEVAL02}, #{SC_CODELV}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE s_common_code_sub SET SC_CODENM = #{SC_CODENM}, SC_CODEVAL01 = #{SC_CODEVAL01}, SC_CODEVAL02 = #{SC_CODEVAL02}, SC_CODELV = #{SC_CODELV}, SC_USE_YN = #{SC_USE_YN} WHERE SC_KEYNO = #{SC_KEYNO}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM s_common_code_sub LEFT JOIN s_common_code_main MAIN ON SC_MC_IN_C = MAIN.MC_IN_C WHERE SC_MC_IN_C = #{MC_IN_C} AND MAIN.MC_USE_YN = 'Y' AND SC_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SC_CODELV
SELECT * FROM s_common_code_sub LEFT JOIN s_common_code_main MAIN ON SC_MC_IN_C = MAIN.MC_IN_C ORDER BY SC_MC_IN_C,SC_CODELV
SELECT * FROM s_common_code_sub LEFT JOIN s_common_code_main MAIN ON SC_MC_IN_C = MAIN.MC_IN_C WHERE SC_MC_IN_C = #{MC_IN_C} AND SC_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SC_CODELV
mapper.update: UPDATE s_common_code_main SET MC_CODENM = #{MC_CODENM}, MC_MODDT = SYSDATE() WHERE MC_KEYNO = #{MC_KEYNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO s_common_code_main( MC_KEYNO, MC_CODENM, MC_REGDT, MC_IN_C, MC_SYS_YN, MC_USE_YN ) VALUES( #{MC_KEYNO}, #{MC_CODENM}, SYSDATE(), #{MC_IN_C}, 'N', 'Y' )

INSERT INTO s_common_code_sub( SC_KEYNO, SC_MC_IN_C, SC_CODENM, SC_CODEVAL01, SC_CODEVAL02, SC_CODELV, SC_USE_YN ) VALUES( #{SC_KEYNO}, #{SC_MC_IN_C}, #{SC_CODENM}, #{SC_CODEVAL01}, #{SC_CODEVAL02}, #{SC_CODELV}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE s_common_code_sub SET SC_CODENM = #{SC_CODENM}, SC_CODEVAL01 = #{SC_CODEVAL01}, SC_CODEVAL02 = #{SC_CODEVAL02}, SC_CODELV = #{SC_CODELV}, SC_USE_YN = #{SC_USE_YN} WHERE SC_KEYNO = #{SC_KEYNO}
mapper.select:
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(SC_CODENM SEPARATOR '|') FROM s_common_code_sub WHERE SC_KEYNO IN
#{type}
